# Psor

**Summary**: An iterative method used to solve large systems of linear equations in reservoir simulation.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[1993-al-towailib|Al-Towailib, 1993]] applied PSOR to find the most efficient iterative technique for pressure calculation.

## Instruments and Software



## Typical Workflow



## Key Results and Findings

- The PSOR method was found to be the most efficient iterative technique in terms of both CPU time and memory requirements (7,916 bytes). ([[1993-al-towailib|Al-Towailib, 1993, p. 174]])
